72617.title: Call the Midwife
72617.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

72618.title: Summer of Rockets
72618.description: Hannah arrives at Buckingham Palace, but is too late to be presented. Samuel meets two men who are interested in his invention: Denning and Mr Field. He learns that they are from MI5 and he is sworn to secrecy, and the Petrukhins attend a fete at the Shaw's.

72619.title: Father Brown : The Skylark Scandal
72619.description: The Kembleford Ramblers' annual outing takes a tragic turn for the worst when the local lord is found strangled.

72620.title: Call the Midwife
72620.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

72621.title: Summer of Rockets
72621.description: Hannah arrives at Buckingham Palace, but is too late to be presented. Samuel meets two men who are interested in his invention: Denning and Mr Field. He learns that they are from MI5 and he is sworn to secrecy, and the Petrukhins attend a fete at the Shaw's.

72622.title: Mary Berry Cooks : For a Crowd
72622.description: Mary Berry is cooking dishes for a family celebration. She makes it seem almost effortless, with recipes for beef and mushroom stew with mustard mash, salmon en croûte with a foolproof salad, and chocolate and orange panna cotta.

72623.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : The Rascal Cook
72623.description: Frank and Lu investigate a case of culinary sabotage when a restaurant owner accuses a food critic of giving him an undeserved bad review.

72624.title: Bargain Hunt : Kedleston 20
72624.description: Eric Knowles presents from the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire with experts Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two sets of mums and daughters battle it out to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, while Eric finds out about Derby's industrial heritage.

72625.title: Bad Move : Get Lost
72625.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

72626.title: Keeping Up Appearances : A Barbecue at Violet's
72626.description: Hyacinth still wants to join Emmet's production of `The Boyfriend', but fortunately for him, other things have to take priority.

72628.title: EastEnders
72628.description: Sonia lets her guard down as Nancy and Frankie meddle in Shirley's love life. Tiffany's insecurities cause her to make a snap decision. Callum feels helpless, and Jean has some advice for Ruby, who feels like giving up.

72629.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : The Rascal Cook
72629.description: Frank and Lu investigate a case of culinary sabotage when a restaurant owner accuses a food critic of giving him an undeserved bad review.

72630.title: Bargain Hunt : Kedleston 20
72630.description: Eric Knowles presents from the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire with experts Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two sets of mums and daughters battle it out to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, while Eric finds out about Derby's industrial heritage.

72631.title: Impossible
72631.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

72632.title: Antiques Roadshow : Buckfast Abbey 2
72632.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

72633.title: Bad Move : Get Lost
72633.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

72634.title: Keeping Up Appearances : A Barbecue at Violet's
72634.description: Hyacinth still wants to join Emmet's production of `The Boyfriend', but fortunately for him, other things have to take priority.

72635.title: Bargain Hunt : Hemswell 28
72635.description: Anita Manning presents from Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire with experts Christina Trevanion and Nick Hall. There is magic in the air as a magician and his assistant take on a mother and daughter to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction.

72637.title: EastEnders
72637.description: Sonia lets her guard down as Nancy and Frankie meddle in Shirley's love life. Tiffany's insecurities cause her to make a snap decision. Callum feels helpless, and Jean has some advice for Ruby, who feels like giving up.

72638.title: Impossible
72638.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

72639.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : Ill Met by Moonlight
72639.description: Frank and Lu must recover a precious jewel and a rebellious teenager before midnight strikes at Lady Bede's End of Summer Ball.

72640.title: Antiques Roadshow : Buckfast Abbey 2
72640.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

72641.title: Bad Move : Day Trip
72641.description: Nicky and Steve are missing the city, and fantasise about all the exciting things they could be doing before both experience a bizarre and unusual day.

72642.title: Keeping Up Appearances : The Rolls Royce
72642.description: When Hyacinth decides that a new car is in order, she aims rather higher than most people - much to Richard's horror.
